tools.name: search_prompts
tools.description: Search the PromptSharp prompt library. Returns ready-to-run AI prompts scoped to your license tier (no token = 15 public teasers; vertical Pro = your vertical; all-access = the full cross-vertical library). Locked results are shown as stubs with an upgrade hint.

tools.name: get_prompt
tools.description: Fetch one prompt by id: the full copy-paste prompt plus its guardrails and a why-it-works note. Requires that the prompt is within your license scope.

tools.name: list_verticals
tools.description: List every vertical in the PromptSharp library with its sections, prompt counts, and whether it is unlocked for your current license tier.
